audit_items.proof_trace: `s_entered` is set to `true` at L418 and not cleared until L457, so `auctionCallback` at L449 always executes in locked state. Re-entry into `bid()` is blocked by the guard at L415-417. All other state-modifying functions require privileged roles (ASSET_ADMIN_ROLE, DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE) or independently guard against live-auction modifications via `s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0` checks, making permissionless state manipulation between the transfer-out (L444) and pull-in (L453) impossible.
